---
title: "OPM Azure APIM Integration Adapter — Centralized Federal API Gateway Authority"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-053 · ACCEPTED"
date: 2026-05-04
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-053** — status: **ACCEPTED** — decided: **2026-05-04**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-053-opm-azure-apim-adapter.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-053-opm-azure-apim-adapter.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-072](adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-053-opm-azure-apim-adapter.md >}}
